release_notes:
- v0.8.3은 selected-issue tagging, Wanted issues 하위 집합 강제 큐잉, CRC checks, CBL reading-list import screen을 추가합니다.
- search timing, search interval naming, table shift-select, GetComics logging이 개선되었습니다.
- out-of-order release-date post-processing, SAB/NZBGET download handling, RSS feed URL construction, notification issues가 수정되었습니다.
